mapper.insert: insert into todos (user_id, category_id, title, memo, due_date, due_time, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{dueDate}, #{dueTime}, #{priority}, #{isFlagged}, #{isCompleted}, now(), now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from todos where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at asc;
select * from todos where title = #{title} order by created_at asc;
